title: Charred German Skillet
description: A hearty German-inspired skillet dish filled with charred ground beef and served with a side of steamed vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ground beef and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the charred onions, German-style mustard, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Add the skillet-cut potatoes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 10-12 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the liquid has thickened.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
